title: Test Display for Percentage
scenario: Formatting is public behavior. A small table keeps display expectations obvious.
instructions: Implement Display for Percentage and add table-driven display tests.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps percentage-display-tests explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
